review_policy: Automation detects and drafts. A person approves public claims, directory changes, contact details, funding terms, deadlines, rates, and civic guidance.

action_queue.label: monitored sources needing attention
action_queue.next_action: Open the latest source-audit report and confirm failures in a normal browser.

action_queue.label: priority directory candidates
action_queue.next_action: Confirm each linked listing page before adding it to canonical data.

action_queue.label: canonical rows without a website or source URL
action_queue.next_action: Enrich high-value entries first; do not invent contact paths.

action_queue.label: low-confidence text candidates
action_queue.next_action: Review only after the linked priority queue; do not publish from page text alone.
